messages.otp_sent_phone: OTP sent successfully to your phone number

jobs.status_updated_msg: The job {title} status has been updated to {status}.
jobs.job_approved_msg: Your job {title} has been approved and published.
jobs.new_proposal_msg: A new proposal has been submitted for your job: {title}
jobs.proposal_rejected_msg: Your proposal for job {title} has been rejected.
jobs.proposal_accepted_msg: Your proposal for job {title} has been accepted. An order was created.
jobs.proposal_status_updated_msg: Your proposal for job {title} status has been updated to: {status}.
jobs.order_created_msg: An order has been created from your accepted proposal for job: {title}

referral.signup_msg: User {username} signed up using your referral code!

services.new_service_pending_msg: A new service {title} was created and is pending your review.
services.status_updated_msg: The service {title} status has been updated to {status}.

new_message.subject: New message from {senderName}
new_message.title: You've got a message!
new_message.body: {senderName} sent you a new message on Helhal.

common.support_team_help: If you have any questions, our support team is always here to help.
common.contact_support_here: If you have any questions, contact our support team here.
common.received_due_to_settings: You received this because of your notification settings at {siteName}.
common.need_help_contact_support: Need help? Contact Support Team

otp.subject: {actionType} - Verification Code
otp.title: Your Verification Code
otp.body: We received a request to {actionType}. Use the code below to proceed:
otp.footer: This code is valid for 5 minutes. If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

verification.subject: Verify Your Email Address
verification.title: Welcome, {username}!
verification.body: Thank you for registering! To complete your profile, please use the verification code below:

password_reset.subject: Password Reset OTP
password_reset.title: Hello {username},
password_reset.body1: We received a request to reset your password. If you did not make this request, please ignore this email.
password_reset.body2: Your OTP for resetting your password is:
password_reset.footer: This OTP is valid for 10 minutes.

password_changed.subject: Password Changed Successfully
password_changed.title: Hello {username},
password_changed.body1: Your account password has been successfully changed.
password_changed.body2: If you did not perform this change, please contact our support team immediately.

email_changed.subject: Email Address Updated Successfully
email_changed.title: Hello {username},
email_changed.body1: Your account email address has been successfully updated.
email_changed.body2: If you did not request this change, please contact our support team immediately to secure your account.

email_change_confirmation.subject: Confirm Your New Email Address
email_change_confirmation.title: Hello {username},
email_change_confirmation.body1: You requested to change your email address.
email_change_confirmation.body2: Click the button below to confirm your new email:
email_change_confirmation.footer: If you did not request this change, please ignore this email.

invite.title: You Have Been Invited!
invite.body: {senderName} has invited you to join our platform.
invite.instruction: If you wish to join, simply click the link included above inside the invitation message.

welcome.subject_buyer: Welcome to {siteName} – Find the Perfect Freelancer
welcome.body_seller_p1: You’re now part of our growing community of talented professionals.
welcome.body_seller_p2: Create your services, showcase your skills, and start earning by working with clients from all over the world.
welcome.body_seller_li3: Get paid securely for your work
welcome.body_buyer_p1: You’re all set to find skilled professionals for your projects.
welcome.body_buyer_p2: Post jobs, explore top services, and collaborate with trusted freelancers easily.

seller_fee_policy.subject: Important: Understanding our Seller Fee Structure at {siteName}
seller_fee_policy.title: Transparent Pricing for Sellers
seller_fee_policy.body1: Welcome to the community! To help you manage your business effectively, we want to provide clear information on how payments and fees work on {siteName}.
seller_fee_policy.fee_body: For every order you complete, a service fee of {feePercent}% is deducted from the total order amount.
seller_fee_policy.example: Example: If you sell a service for {amount}, you will receive {receivedAmount} after the platform fee.
